title: Brushworks Pink Cloud Beauty Headband – Ultra-Soft, Puffy Terry Cloth Headband for Skincare, Makeup & Face Washing, Comfortable, Non-Slip Design for Women, Girls
features: SOFT & COMFORTABLE – Made from ultra-soft, plush material for a gentle, comfortable feel while protecting your hairline during beauty routines.

PERFECT FOR SKINCARE & MAKEUP – Crafted from absorbent terry cloth material, this headband keeps hair in place and acts as the perfect barrier during cleansing, facials, makeup application and spa treatments.
NON-SLIP, SECURE FIT – Designed to fit various head shapes, this lightweight headband stays comfortably in place without pulling or snagging hair.

PERFECT GIFT FOR BEAUTY LOVERS – With its chic cloud design and plush comfort, this spa-style headband makes a thoughtful gift for birthdays, holidays, Valentine’s Day, Christmas or self-care hampers.
description: Brushworks Pink Cloud Headband is a luxurious polyester headband, perfect for keeping your hair out of your face while providing a spa-like experience. Made from soft and absorbent polyester, keeping your hair safe and dry when cleansing your face. This headband is comfortable and stylish, the perfect addition to your beauty routine! PETA Approved - Cruelty-Free & Vegan Friendly.
